title: Friends & Foes x Bare Bones x Fresh Animations (UNSUPPORTED)
description: Bare Bones textures for Friends & Foes that have support for Fresh Animations
body:
Bare Bones textures for all of [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)

Be sure to look at the dependencies!

Also supports the Flowery Mooblooms addon

Make sure to delete the creeper texture built into F.M.R.P, it conflicts with Bare Bones

Order from bottom to top should be [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones), [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations), [F.M.R.P](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/freshly-modded), This Pack
